channel.title: Slides on Ross Larson
channel.description: Recent content in Slides on Ross Larson

item.title: Ross Test
item.description: class: title, smokescreen, shelf, no-footer background-image: url(leo-serrat-533922-unsplash.jpg) Ross is Creating Beautiful Presentations With Remark, Apron, Adirondack, and Descartes ??? And writes notes! Ross Does The Story Remark Themes Story offers helper themes for creating beautiful presentations with Remark, using simple Markdown to create slide layouts. Apron defines the layouts’ structure and size. Adirondack adds typography, theme colors, and helpful features. Descartes provides element and image positioning and colors. Story has a design goal of clean, simple Markdown content.

item.title: Creating Beautiful Presentations with Story
